# terrible_openstack_cloud_subnet (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name of the subnet that should be created. Although Neutron allows for non-unique subnet names, this module enforces subnet name uniqueness.

### Optional

- `allocation_pool_end` (String) From the subnet pool the last IP that should be assigned to the virtual machines.
- `allocation_pool_start` (String) From the subnet pool the starting address from which the IP should be allocated.
- `allocation_pools` (String) List of allocation pools to assign to the subnet. Each element consists of a 'start' and 'end' value.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `cidr` (String) The CIDR representation of the subnet that should be assigned to the subnet. Required when *state* is 'present' and a subnetpool is not specified.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Description of the subnet
- `disable_gateway_ip` (Boolean) The gateway IP would not be assigned for this subnet
- `dns_nameservers` (String) List of DNS nameservers for this subnet.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `extra_attrs` (String) Dictionary with extra key/value pairs passed to the API
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `gateway_ip` (String) The ip that would be assigned to the gateway for this subnet
- `host_routes` (String) A list of host route dictionaries for the subnet.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ip_version` (Number) The IP version of the subnet 4 or 6
- `ipv6_address_mode` (String) IPv6 address mode
- `ipv6_ra_mode` (String) IPv6 router advertisement mode
- `is_dhcp_enabled` (Boolean) Whether DHCP should be enabled for this subnet.
- `network` (String) Name or id of the network to which the subnet should be attached Required when *state* is 'present'
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `prefix_length` (String) The prefix length to use for subnet allocation from a subnet pool
- `project` (String) Project name or ID containing the subnet (name admin-only)
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the resource
- `subnet_pool` (String) The subnet pool name or ID from which to obtain a CIDR
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `use_default_subnet_pool` (Boolean) Use the default subnetpool for *ip_version* to obtain a CIDR.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `subnet` (String) Dictionary describing the subnet.
